creator: saper@system.pl
text:
On Thu, 6 Jan 2000, Alexander Langer wrote:

> We now have different PLIST.{SE,BRITISH,FR,DEALT,...}, that are build to a common PLIST for the port.
> 
> This PR supercedes (sp?) at least one PR by me (ispell-dictionaries) and two ports
> (textproc/{br,se}-ispell)

Please, please do increase MASKBITS to 64 and make sure all hashes are rebuilt.
Soon I will have a Polish dictionary prepared and they require all lower and
uppercase letters for flags (sorry, our language is quite difficult:)

Second thing is, ispell puts dictionaries into... /usr/local/lib.
This clearly violates hier(7), imho it should be set to /usr/local/share/ispell/
or something.

Are there any other apps using hardwired /usr/local/lib location? Should we PR them?

-- 
                 << Marcin Cieslak // saper@system.pl >>
